# Confidence Levels

Use confidence levels instead of emotional certainty.

## C0 — Untested

```text
idea exists but has not shipped
```

## C1 — Shipped once

```text
one result, no replication
```

## C2 — Directional signal

```text
one strong result or two weakly positive results
```

## C3 — Replicated signal

```text
3 related executions, majority positive
```

## C4 — Robust mechanism

```text
works across topics, time windows, or surfaces
```

## C5 — Core format

```text
replicated, robust, production-ready, strategically aligned
```

## Promotion rules

```text
C0 → C1: publish once
C1 → C2: primary metric beats baseline
C2 → C3: replication trio positive
C3 → C4: holdout ladder positive
C4 → C5: production template and portfolio integration complete
```

## Demotion rules

```text
trust failure: demote immediately
3 failures: demote or kill
platform-only success: constrain confidence to that platform
trend-only success: label fragile
```
